items.title: Discord 社区日报 (2026-05-11)
items.summary: 今日 9,841 条消息，352 位活跃用户，1,226 次反应。热门频道：🔸綜合討論(3555)、🔸general-chat(1892)、🔸game-question(1023)、🔸ruang-obrolan-indonesia(846)、🔸canal-português(685)

items.title: [DC] morimensstaff06@🔸活动资讯┊event-information: **✨ 忘却前夜×沙耶之歌 2.5 周年联动献礼**  漂泊的种子，跨越了次元之壁，在荒芜上迎风生长......繁衍。 「这就是，新世界的开始……」  登录与完
items.summary:
**✨ 忘却前夜×沙耶之歌 2.5 周年联动献礼**

漂泊的种子，跨越了次元之壁，在荒芜上迎风生长......繁衍。
「这就是，新世界的开始……」

登录与完成特定关卡即可获得如下全部奖励：
✦ 珍稀限定抽取道具「空幻之芯」×250
✦ SSR限定唤醒体「沙耶」
🎁 更多周年献礼，敬请期待！

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

**✨ Morimens × Saya no Uta 2.5th Anniversary Collaboration**

A wandering seed, crossing the boundaries between worlds, taking root and blooming across the barren earth... multiplying.
*"This is... where a new world begins."*

Log in and complete select stages to claim all of the following rewards:
✦ Rare Limited Gacha Item "Ethereal Core" ×250
✦ SSR Limited Awakener "Saya"
🎁 More anniversary gifts await. Stay tuned!

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

**✨ 모리멘스 × 사야의 노래 2.5주년 콜라보레이션**

떠도는 씨앗은 차원의 벽을 넘어, 황폐한 대지에 바람을 맞으며 자라나고...... 번식한다.
「이것이 바로, 새로운 세계의 시작……」

로그인 및 특정 스테이지 클리어 시 아래의 모든 보상을 획득할 수 있습니다.
✦ 희귀 한정 뽑기 아이템 「공허의 핵」 × 250
✦ SSR 한정 각성체 「사야」
🎁 더 많은 애니버서리 특별 선물도 기대해 주세요!

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

**2.5周年联动献礼图片┊2.5th Anniversary Collaboration Images**
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1503290575754100856/1503328232135720982
  └ darkerkuro: 
  └ rosemry:

items.title: [DC] aileenatsuki@🔸活动资讯┊event-information: As much as I disagree with the "doomposters", I personally rather have them than
items.summary:
As much as I disagree with the "doomposters", I personally rather have them than having this community being a complete dick rider.

Ideally, we can all have our opinion and mind our own business, maybe have a decent and healthy argument here and there while also letting BIAV decide what's good for the game (and in turn the player).

It's okay to be disappointed with their decision just as much as being satisfied with them. BIAV is not a bunch of kindergarten kids who needs cuddling.
  └ arandomflamev2: Biva
items.author: aileenatsuki

items.title: [DC] yaoshidoppa@🔸canal-español: ✨ Morimens × Saya no Uta ┊ Colaboración del 2.5.º Aniversario  Una semilla erran
items.summary:
✨ Morimens × Saya no Uta ┊ Colaboración del 2.5.º Aniversario

Una semilla errante, cruzando las fronteras entre mundos, echando raíces y floreciendo sobre la tierra estéril… multiplicándose.
“Este es… el lugar donde comienza un nuevo mundo.”

Inicia sesión y completa ciertas etapas para reclamar todas las siguientes recompensas: ✦ Objeto raro limitado de gacha “Núcleo Etéreo” ×250
✦ Despertador SSR limitado “Saya”
🎁 ¡Más regalos de aniversario están en camino! ¡Mantente atento!
[附件: 20260511_023929.jpg]

  └ feet_17: B.I.V.A. 🗣️
